entry.title: Re: How can a user an AP / AR document's owner ?
entry.content: The attached picture described the relationship between the Users and the Documents Owner.

entry.title: i want use multiple read statement in for loop
entry.content:
hello All,

I am looking for some help in understanding the concept of for loop.

I am using a for loop where i am read the value from table if the value is not present then i want to take from other table 

 old code 
  LOOP AT IT_VBRK_VBRP ASSIGNING <WA_VBRK_VBRP>.
      CLEAR: WA_VBKD_A.
      READ TABLE I_VBKD_A INTO WA_VBKD_A WITH KEY VBELN = <WA_VBRK_VBRP>-AUBEL
                                                  POSNR = <WA_VBRK_VBRP>-AUPOS .
      IF SY-SUBRC <> 0.
        READ TABLE I_VBKD_A INTO WA_VBKD_A WITH KEY VBELN = <WA_VBRK_VBRP>-AUBEL
                                                    POSNR = '000000'.
        IF SY-SUBRC = 0.
          <WA_VBRK_VBRP>-BSTKD = WA_VBKD_A-BSTKD.
        ENDIF.
      ELSE.
        <WA_VBRK_VBRP>-BSTKD = WA_VBKD_A-BSTKD.
      ENDIF.
endloop.



New code which i want to optimize 
 IT_VBRK_VBRP_1[] = VALUE #( FOR <WA_VBRK_VBRP> IN IT_VBRK_VBRP[] (
        BSTKD = COND #( LET WA_VBKD_A = VALUE #( I_VBKD_A[ VBELN = <WA_VBRK_VBRP>-AUBEL
                                                           POSNR = <WA_VBRK_VBRP>-AUPOS  ] ) IN
                      WHEN WA_VBKD_A IS NOT INITIAL
                      THEN WA_VBKD_A-BSTKD
                      ELSE I_VBKD_A[ VBELN = <WA_VBRK_VBRP>-AUBEL
                                     POSNR = '00000'  ]-BSTKD ) ) ) .

For Above code i am getting dump ITAB_LINE_NOT_FOUND even though the line is there so i need to know how to handle if the line does not exists. 

@Sandra_Rossi 

@SAPSupport 

@RaymondGiuseppi

entry.title: Re: SAP Developer Challenge March - SAP Community Escape House - AI 🤖🧠
entry.content: @OlgenH Yes you need a service that we provided when the challenge was active. Can you send me an email at nora.von.thenen@sap.com and I will see what we can do to get you a key to try the challenge 🙂

entry.title: Re: Exam/Assessment Solutions
entry.content:
Hi,

I have looked into different exam/quizzing tools. They are usually a bit more elegant and provide more flexibility on the user experience.

However, with time, I am now enforcing to use only the built-in exam tool. This is mainly due to reporting and technical issues we had in time. The scorm2004 reporting on exam never gave what we needed, and I prefer also to publish eLearning material in SCORM1.2, as the 2004 has this duplicate navigation (even though you can tweak the code to remove it).

In the end, here is my advise:

  1. all scorm course content in scorm1.2, no built-in exam. Completion is based on page views. If there are knowledge check etc, that fine. But not counting for the course pass grade 
  2. all exam quizzes are done in LMS. 
  3. completion is either on all content objects, or only on the exam (this is a limitation of the LMS)

This has made is much easier to manage, and provides a rather consistent user experience.

Hope this helps,

Kris.

entry.title: Re: Error in Goal Plan when sum of weights is greater than 100
entry.content: let me know if this worked

entry.title: Re: error when recording characterist on QA32: The entere...
entry.content:
There was a problem with the data migration.

The target value, first upper limits, and the other limits were set to 0.00. Only the upper and lower specification limits were correct. After removing the wrong values from the inspection plan, the system correctly recognized the specification limits.

entry.title: Re: How to turn off the 'Add Comments | Refactor' automat...
entry.content: Thank You very much Rima for the fast update, much appreciated for the help! It is not a high priority item, but would definitely love to have it!

entry.title: Re: How to setup Uninterrupted Sequential Numbering for M...
entry.content:
Hello,

first of all, I´d like to clarify that transaction MIRO does not reflect the accounting document.

The Accounting document comes after the posting in MIRO, so MIRO Numbers are not accounting documents.

For Financial Number Range assignment in public cloud please have a look here: Document Number Assignment | SAP Help Portal

 

If you are interested in Specific Number Ranges in MIRO, this can be an option as well: Configuring System-Generated Official Document Numbers for Self-Billing Invoices | SAP Help Portal

 

KR

Christian Seelinger

entry.title: Re: TARGET and SOURCE are not replaced for qRFC, tRFC, IDOC monitors when importing json
entry.content: To assist you further, could you specify which function you are referring to? Additionally, it would be helpful if you could share the configuration link that you are referring to. This will allow me to provide you with the most accurate and efficient assistance.

entry.title: Re: Deep dive into the Fit-to-Standard Workshops to streamline SAP S/4Hana Public Cloud Implementati
entry.content: @Eric_Yu  I am trying to delete the post. Can you please help?

entry.title: How to Copy Prod System Data to Test System
entry.content:
Dear Team,

Can you explain how to copy the data of production environment to test environment.

Best Regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to Copy Prod System Data to Test System
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

 

To copy the data from prod tenant to test tenant, please open a service request from your prod tenant or test tenant by following steps:

  1. Service Control Center - Systems
  2. Choose the test tenant
  3. Click Refresh tenant
  4. Fill the data as following:
    1. Refresh Type: Refresh from Source System
    2. Source Data: the prod tenant 
    3. Downtime Start: Choose the time when we can start the copy process.
    4. Check Copy all attachment and change document.
  5. Click OK.

Then the service request will be send to our operation team and they will process the refresh. When the configured downtime is started, for the first four hours, the prod tenant will be down and will be released after the end of the first four hours. After the first 4 hours, we need another 10~15 hours to prepare the test tenant. The time may be less or more due to the data volume needed to copy.

One important point is that the downtime should be at least before 4 hours of TEST system CMP or after 4 hours of production system CMP. The CMP can be checked in Service Control Center - Calendar. Here is a KBA about Tenant Refresh for your reference. https://me.sap.com/notes/2340655

 

Best Regards,

SAP Technical Support,

Cariford

entry.title: Re: Release Navigator for Supply Chain Management - What's New in 2505
entry.content: Hi @Andrew_Ford you might want to include the SAP Note on Manual Activities for SAP Digital Manufacturing into the Release Navigator which is published every release as well. For example for 2505 release: https://me.sap.com/notes/3576198

entry.title: Status 502
entry.content:
Hello,

 

I am doing the "Connect your SAP Build App to a Public API" and i have a problem at Step 3.

At step 3, when i have to test the "retrieve" config, it gives me a: "message": "Request failed with status code 502". I don't understand what i did wrong. I followed the tutorial step by step (i even tried again from scratch and gave me the same thing).

Thank you.

entry.title: Delivery Completion Indicator PO item - MM_PUR_S4_PO_MODIFY_ITEM
entry.content:
Hi,

I am implementing the cloud BAdI MM_PUR_S4_PO_MODIFY_ITEM to set the Delivery Completion Indicator at the purchase order item level based on certain conditions.

However, I found that the purchaseorderitem parameter is an importing variable and cannot be modified directly.

Could you please suggest how I can achieve this requirement?

ERP: S4HANA Cloud Private Edition, SP: 2

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Process Automation (trial) instance could n...
entry.content:
Hello,

These issues have become increasingly common due to recent updates and changes SAP has implemented across its trial environments, particularly affecting services like SAP Build Apps, Build Process Automation, and Work Zone.

Please ensure under Entitlements->Service Assignments->BPA is listed.

All did and still for me also subscription failed.

Hope someone at SAP would be able to address this in the trial instance.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Update primary & secondary email for an user in Succe...
entry.content:
Hi Simon,

Thanks for your comment and the influence you gave me. I wasn't aware such influence was already there for SF. 

However, I have limited understanding on EntraID yet, whereas in SAP IDM we can temporarily or permanently store values into IDM attributes while reading from SF and hence we can utilize such values while writeback into AD or SF or anywhere.

In this case, I have successfully achieved the requirement by storing personal email into IDM attribute while we read data from SF. During write, I'm first writing the business email using the parameter "purgeType = full" this will remove everything in PerEmail entity and write the business email as primary. And after a few seconds using the parameter "purgeType = incremental" I'm writing a personal email as a secondary, which suffices my need.

-RP

entry.title: Re: SAP CC allowance counters
entry.content:
Hello,

if you have a set of counters which have a validity period, the recommendation is to manage these counter inside an allowance which has the same validity period. 

Just take care to manage properly the purge of the expired allowance in order to avoid to keep too many useless data in memory.

Best regards,

Eric F.

entry.title: Re: Ship to party
entry.content:
@a_montesdeoca

Thank you for your solution.

entry.title: Re: Hello. I have a question regarding UI5 ColorPalette.
entry.content: Hello, I solved it by setting addEventListner to the icon in the controller to force the color not to change. I think this is a bug and needs to be fixed. Thank You.

entry.title: SF TIH Proficieny Level Scales
entry.content:
Hello,

 

I haven't been able to find any valid information about the Proficiency Level Scales for skills and competencies in SAP's documentation on TIH. On an event last year at an SAP booth, I was advised to keep the default 5-level scaling. The reason for this was that it was very difficult to predict what impact adjusting the scaling would have on other functions in SuccessFactors.

On the other hand, I read in the current Implementation Guide and other TIH documentation that the scale can initially be customized to each customer. If I were to choose a 6-level scale for skills and competencies, for example, that would be possible according to this interpretation.

I'm a bit confused about the current status regarding the possible or recommended scaling.

entry.title: Re: Create a SQL user with access to multiple spaces in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
@vikasparmar88 

if you mean The "database analysis users" they have a fixed limit on CPU usage at 10% and can see every schema in read only.

Another problem is that they generate a lot of audit log records that are kept for 6 months (deletion frequency not manageable). 

I encounter a case in which the audit log records were above 400'000 and the DB user was locked by the system to avoid audit log space to explode.

=> avoid using database analysis users for connections.

entry.title: SF Learning Delegation Email Link on ILX
entry.content:
Hi,

Since we implemented the new Learning Homepage, the link provided to the delegate does not open directly to the approval page (as a delegate). Instead, it opens his own learning homepage. Is there a way to create a direct link to the delegator's approval page?

entry.content:
Hello Team

Have a nice day!

SAP PM WCM configuration

Can we attach documents against the Work permit application inside the work approval and work application?

When assign permit to maintenance order in T-Code IW31

After that we can track those work permit in T-code WCL9 

As per business requirement, I am facing challenge to attach documents inside WCL9 hierarchy level

Maintenance Order

Work Approval - Need to add attachment

Work Permit Application - Need to add attachment   

 

Thank You,

Vishal Panchal

entry.title: AI-Powered SAP Fiori App Generation from Images
entry.content:
Just like when SAP Build Apps was first announced and everyone was buzzing about what it was and how it worked, you're probably now wondering the same thing about using AI with SAP Fiori tools to build fiori apps. And honestly, wanting to know exactly how to jump in is spot on!

Because you're the ones who truly drive innovation with SAP, let's dive into how you can leverage the power of AI to jumpstart your app development with this fantastic feature.

Generating an App? Let Your Pictures Do the Talking!

We all know that sometimes, the app development journey can feel a bit like navigating a complex maze. But guess what? Using images with the Project Accelerator and SAP Fiori tools AI is like getting a super helpful map (and maybe even a friendly tour guide!)

So, you've got that brilliant app idea swirling in your head, right? Or you are gathering requirements from your customer on a whiteboard? Or maybe you've even doodled a quick sketch of how you envision it looking. Well, hold onto your hats, because you can actually show that picture to the AI, and it can help bring your vision to life! Yes, you read that correctly – your sketches can become the foundation of your app!

Whether you prefer describing your requirements with precise language or letting a visual representation of your business app screen do the talking, these intelligent tools understand! And just like that, they can generate the fundamental building blocks of your application – the underlying data structure, the core functionalities, sample data for testing, and even the initial user interface. Whether it's a straightforward list, a detailed view accessible with a click, or a simple data entry form, the possibilities are pretty darn impressive, wouldn't you agree?

Now, just like preparing for any successful endeavor, there are a few essential prerequisites to ensure a smooth experience. Think of these as gathering your key ingredients before embarking on a culinary masterpiece (or in our case, an app-building adventure!).

Here are the essential steps to get you started:

  1. Ensure Access to SAP Build Code: First and foremost, you'll need to have access to the SAP Build Code environment. This could be through a paid subscription or by signing up for the free trial. Consider this your entry ticket to the AI-powered app development playground.
  2. Set Up Your Development Workspace: Within SAP Build Code, you'll need a dedicated "dev space." This is your personal workshop where all the magic happens. Make sure you have the SAP Fiori tools and CAP tools extensions installed within this space. Think of these as your essential software tools, ready for action.
  3. Access SAP Business Application Studio: You'll be working within the SAP Business Application Studio (BAS). This is your integrated development environment (IDE) – your central command center for interacting with the AI and building your app.

Alright, with the foundational elements in place, let's get to the exciting part – turning your pictures into apps!

Here’s a professional breakdown of how to use an image to generate your application:

  1. Prepare Your Visual Blueprint: Your image should clearly represent the desired look and feel of your application. For optimal results, try to label the different parts of your image using clear and concise English. For instance, consider an example like: "Manage Travel List Report Page" with clear indications of columns, buttons, and layout.
  2. Place Your Picture in the Right Spot: Within SAP Business Application Studio, navigate to your workspace folder and upload the image file. Think of this as placing your design specifications directly onto your project workbench.
  3. Initiate the Project Accelerator: You can launch the AI-powered Project Accelerator in the following professional ways:
    • Using the Command Palette: Press CMD/CTRL + Shift + P to open the Command Palette. Then, search for and execute the command: Fiori tools AI: Launch the Project Accelerator.
    • Via the SAP Fiori Tools Icon: On the Activity Bar (usually on the left-hand side), locate and click the SAP Fiori icon (it resembles a wrench and a pencil).
  4. Important Consideration: Once the Project Accelerator is active, it's specifically designed for generating SAP Fiori elements applications. General, non-Fiori related requests won't be processed by the AI assistant at this stage.
  5. Provide Your Image to the AI: Within the Project Accelerator interface, locate the "Choose file (.md .txt .jpg)" button. Click it and select the image file you previously uploaded.
  6. Focus on Single Application Generation: Currently, the Project Accelerator is optimized for generating one application per project. Ensure your request aligns with the creation of a single SAP Fiori elements application.
  7. Initiate the Generation Process: Click the "Generate" button. The AI will now analyze your image and begin constructing the application based on its interpretation. The generation time may vary depending on the complexity of your visual input.
  8. Managing the Generation Process: Should you need to halt the generation process at any point (perhaps to refine your image or requirements), simply click the "Stop" icon (it looks like a square). You will be prompted with "Are you sure you want to stop generation?". Click "Yes" to confirm. The process will be terminated, and any temporary staging files will be discarded. You can then iterate on your image and initiate a new generation.
  9. Reviewing the Generated Application: Once the generation is complete (or if you stopped it), carefully review the generated application to assess if it aligns with your intended design and functionality. To try a different image, click the "Delete" icon (the trash can), select a new file, and click "Regenerate". To start over completely, click the "Clear" icon (the broom).
  10. Previewing Your Creation: To interact with a live version of your generated application, click the "Preview" button. This will open a preview of your app in a new browser window.
  11. Examining the Staging Area: For more technical insights, explore the generated files within the "Staging Area." This section provides a view of the project structure and the files created by the AI.
  12. Accepting the Generated Project: If you are satisfied with the generated application, click "Accept Project". This action will move the project files from the staging area to your project's file system. You can then leverage the full suite of SAP Fiori tools to further customize and enhance your application.

So, there you have it – a professional yet friendly guide to harnessing the power of images to kickstart your SAP Fiori app development with AI. It's like showing someone a picture of what you want and having them create a basic version for you!

Go ahead and give it a shot with your own images with app requirements; you might just be amazed at the speed and ease of bringing your app ideas to life!

#SAPBTP

entry.title: Re: getting "system" as value for "createdBy" aspect in sap capm
entry.content:
Hello gutsu,

thank you very much for your response, and i have the below approuter in my project

{
      "source": "^/api/.+)$",
      "target": "$1",
      "destination": "srv-api",
      "authenticationType": "xsuaa",
      "csrfProtection": true
    }

entry.title: Permit to Work SAP - Manage Work Permits & Saftey Certificates
entry.content:
Hi Experts

I'm configuring SAP Fiori based solution of WCM- "Permit to Work".

I am assuming Work Permit as Applications and WC documents as Safety Certificates in Permit to Work solution. I did configuration of Work permits and Safety Certificates and working on below Fiori apps:

 

App Description

APP ID

Create work permit Request

F4691

Manage Safety Certificates

F6678

Manage Work Permits

F6579

Manage Safety Certificates

F6678

Permit to Work Overview

F7304

I have below questions, please clarify:

1) Like in classic WCM-Enhanced, we can create Work Approval or Application from Maintenance Order. Can we create Work Permit from Maintenance Order ? 

2) In Classic WCM, we can create WC documents from application. Then enter tag information in swtiching screen. But in new 'Permit to Work' solution, i need to create Safety Certificate with app-Manage Safety Certificates separately and assign safety certificates in Work Permit. I mean not able to create safety certificate from work permit.

3) In Safety Certificate for Isolations, i don't see option to enter Isolation points without master data like we have option in classic WCM.

4) If we create WC applications in SAP using GUI apps and this data don't flow to Permit to Work Overview app- F7304.

Appreciate your help.

Thanks & Regards

Sandeep

entry.title: From Challenge to Transformation: The Power of Intelligent Automation
entry.content:
From Challenge to Transformation: The Power of Intelligent Automation


Organizations today are facing unprecedented challenges—rising costs, increased competition, and evolving customer expectations. The answer for many? Automation. But not just any automation—intelligent automation that goes beyond basic robotic process automation (RPA) to include AI, machine learning, and real-time decision-making.

Let’s explore how businesses can leverage intelligent automation to drive real transformation.

 1. Beyond Task Automation: A Holistic Approach

Traditional RPA automates repetitive tasks, but that alone doesn’t guarantee success. True transformation requires:

✅ Reevaluating business processes – Don’t just automate; redesign workflows for efficiency.
✅ AI-powered decision-making – Use SAP Joule to analyze trends and suggest optimizations.
✅ End-to-end integration – Connecting automation across SAP S/4HANA, SAP Business Data Cloud, and SAP Integration Suite ensures a seamless workflow.

 2. Using AI to Drive Automation Efficiency
The next evolution of automation is AI-driven automation, which can:

🔹 Predict and prevent inefficiencies – AI models analyze historical data to forecast problems before they arise.
🔹 Enable self-learning workflows – Intelligent bots adjust based on performance, ensuring continuous improvement.
🔹 Enhance customer experience – AI chatbots and process automation in SAP can personalize interactions and reduce response times.

 3. A Real-World Success Story
A global manufacturing company faced challenges with supply chain inefficiencies and manual procurement processes. By implementing SAP Build Process Automation and integrating it with SAP Business AI, they:

✅ Achieved 40% operational efficiency gains
✅ Reduced procurement cycle times from weeks to days
✅ Improved decision-making with real-time insights from SAP Business Data Cloud

 4. The Future of Intelligent Automation
Automation is no longer about cost savings—it’s about scalability, resilience, and strategic growth. As businesses adopt AI and automation together, they must:

✅ Invest in AI-powered automation tools like SAP Joule
✅ Ensure seamless integration across ERP, cloud, and data platforms
✅ Continuously refine and optimize processes with real-time insights

The future belongs to companies that leverage intelligent automation to create real business value.

How is your organization using automation to transform?

entry.title: Re: Error while connecting sap UI5 Application in BAS usi...
entry.content:
Hi Akash,

I have few workarounds you can try to resolve this issue

You are initializing Firebase twice:

  • Once directly in your index.html (using this block):

     
    firebase.initializeApp(firebaseConfig);

  • Then again in your firebase.js inside intializeFirebase().
    Firebase doesn't allow calling initializeApp() more than once with the same app name ("[DEFAULT]").

  • Try removing the initialization from index.html and keep it in the firebse.js file
  • Also with the controlId issue seen in your console, I assume there might be an issue with your manifest file, which is why the view/target is not loading

Please let me know if this works, or need more assistance

entry.title: Documents not getting Downloaded - All Modules
entry.content:
500 - Internal error coming when trying to download documents from Recruitment and from all other modules when clicking on the link to download documents it's just not getting downloading.

We have even tried resetting the password for Open Text and established the connection again, but nothing seems to be working. 

If anyone has come across such an error, please respond on the same as this is a priorty issue and any suggestions would be highly appreciated.

entry.title: Re: Horizon Theme and Templates for Stories in SAP Analytics Cloud

entry.title: Setup Cloud ALM to monitor SAP Concur
entry.content:
What permissions does Concur user need to setup Alerts with Cloud ALM?

 

We are trying to setup Cloud ALM to monitor Concur. How can I accomplish that?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Setup Cloud ALM to monitor SAP Concur
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

 

Thanks for contacting SAP.

Messages send from and to SAP Concur are currently only monitored in the context of SAP S/4HANA Cloud, SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud Edition, SAP S/4HANA or in SAP Master Data Integration not in SAP Concur itself.

Please kindly refer to this guide for the available monitoring content under SAP Concur related messages.

To monitor the messages related to SAP Concur in the related cloud services please perform the monitoring setup for the relevant cloud services.

After the setup you can create alerts specific to SAP Concur related messages in the Integration & Exception Monitoring application:

  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition
  • SAP S/4HANA
  • SAP Master Data Integration

Best Regards,

Sunny

entry.title: Re: Generative AI with SAP – Part 5: Introduction to SAP AI Core
entry.content:
@Raja_Gupta 
Thank you for providing useful information. I hope this blog series will be completed. I'm especially looking forward to "Part 9 – Overview of Generative AI Hub."

entry.title: Re: Technical User Date & Time format Settings Change in C4C
entry.content:
Hi all,

unfortunately changing the technical users time zone is no longer possible. See KBA 2593033 - Zeitzone für technischen Benutzer kann nicht geändert werden - SAP for Me

 

Best Regards

Jean-Paul

entry.title: Re: Can you pass sy-subrc as parameter in class constructor?
entry.content:
Storing it in an intermediate variable works correctly. But that is additional line of code every time, wish I could just use sy-subrc directly.

Apparently just calling constructor sets it to 0 before even value is checked and copied to value parameter.

entry.title: Can't set series when creating a Project Management on Service Layer
entry.content:
When creating a Project Management object via Service Layer, even though I set the series on the body, it is ignores it and sets the default one.

There's no issue doing this via SAP, but I don't seem to be able to set it when creating it on a Service Layer POST call.

entry.title: Re: Customer Engagement Initiative 2025 on Business Event Logging
entry.content:
Hi Alexander,

thanks for your nice feedback! Currently we have only the changes, as they are provided by the Business Events (as defined in SAP Accelerator Hub). If (changed) fields are missing for your context you could request them via the customer influence portal https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/1175 . In addition, we are currently checking, how we can add information from change documents as well.

As for your notification/alerting question: yes, this is a known use case. Please send me a direct message, so we can continue discussing this.

Best regards,
Bernd

entry.title: GBB/AUI DEBIT/CREDIT INDICATOR
entry.content:
Hello.

I upgraded the version from S/4HANA 1709 to S/4HANA 2023.
Activity settlement is done through GBB/AUI - PRL setting in CKMLCP. (Actual cost calculation indicator = 2)


[Before upgrading the version]
GBB/AUI FI DOCUMENT - DEBIT/CREDIT INDICATOR(BEKNZ)= ‘S’ OR ‘H’

[After upgrading the version]
GBB/AUI FI DOCUMENT - DEBIT/CREDIT INDICATOR(BEKNZ)= 'A'


I found SAP documents related to this, but I couldn't find them.
May I know the cause and document for these changes?


Thank you.

entry.title: Re: How to Split Employee wise Salary between 2 cost centers?
entry.content: if we want to split personnel costs for several departments between two cost centers. What is the most efficient way to accomplish this?

entry.title: Re: Bringing Apps Onto SAP Fiori Launchpad - SAP S/4HANA User Experience
entry.content:
Hi Costiantyn,

actually I'm glad that you asked - so we know that there's interest to move from Launchpad Designer to Launchpad App Manager and that our tool meets that need. And I got the chance to promote the migration blog SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA - Technical Catalog Migration - SAP Community - after all we want everyone to profit from future innovations which will be developed for that content model.

Best regards,
Ruth

entry.title: Re: Can you pass sy-subrc as parameter in class constructor?
entry.content:
That's what I thought 😉

I am confused by your statement about the additional line every time. Usually you call a constructor only once to instanciate a object. Could you comment on why you say "every time"? Are you typing the call to the ctor multiple times? If so I wonder if there is a general flaw in your architecture. Or maybe I am misunderstanding your description.

entry.title: SAP LogServ integration with Microsoft Sentinel for SAP RISE customers is now GA.
entry.content:
This blog was co-authored by Yossi Hasson (Sentinel Product Lead, Microsoft),  Martin Pankraz (SAP PM, Microsoft),  Aarthi Kannan (ECS Cloud Security Architect)  &  Krishna Rajapantula (ECS Lead of Security Engineering Operations) 

Following last year's Limited preview release, we are thrilled to announce the General Availability of the integration between SAP LogServ and Microsoft Sentinel, exclusively for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, private cloud edition (RISE) customers around the globe.

The solution can be deployed natively from the Microsoft Sentinel Content Hub.

Prerequisites

  • Purchase Order for SAP LogServ should be completed
  • Microsoft Sentinel instance created

How to integrate SAP LogServ with Microsoft Sentinel

    1. SAP RISE customers who subscribed to LogServ, should install SAP LogServ (RISE), S/4 HANA Cloud Private Edition from Microsoft Sentinel Content Hub

      • The connector deployment tries to create all resources in one go. Among them a Microsoft Entra ID app registration. In case the user doing the deployment has not enough rights, this process needs to be split up. Click the button anyways, which finalizes the creation of the Data Collection Endpoint and Data Collection Rule in the same resource group as your Log Analytics Workspace. 
      • If needed, In a second step create your app registration, supply a secret, and assign that Entra ID app id to the Data Collection rule with the role "Monitoring Metrics Publisher".

    2. Once installed the customer should reach out to their: 

      • ECS CDM or ECS TSM and 
      • Putting sap-logserv-sentinel-integration@service.microsoft.com in cc 
      • Use the subject line: "SAP LogServ and Microsoft Sentinel - Activation" Please include your SAP RISE customer details in the email.

    3. Share the following details with SAP using a secure channel (the screenshot below shows all required fields in case the deploying user was able to perform the connect in a single step):

      • Entra ID app id
      • Entra ID app secret (be aware it shows only on first create!)
      • Data Collection Endpoint (looks like this: https://asi-befd1111-c90d-40e8-82f4-4e79d3e4c92b-wts3.westeurope-1.ingest.monitor.azure.com)
      • Data Collection Rule Immutable ID (looks like this: dcr-ce11d6a22f2b41bd864cba7c3040af01)
      • Stream id: Custom-SAPLogServ_CL

SAP will check the eligibility of your RISE project and process your request accordingly. See the first blog for an architecture overview, and log type details. Understand the agentless data connector for the application layer from this Microsoft Learn article.

Get Started Today 

Don't miss this opportunity to enhance your security posture with the powerful combination of SAP LogServ and Microsoft Sentinel. Activate today and be among the first to experience the benefits of this groundbreaking integration. 

We look forward to your participation and to helping you incorporate your SAP RISE environments into your overall IT estate. 

Once Again a Big shoutout to Aarthi, Krishna, Martin and Yossi

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Variable Prompt
entry.content: Thanks Ivan - I will investigate this further.

entry.title: Re: Can you pass sy-subrc as parameter in class constructor?
entry.content:
Just that instead of doing

DATA(x) = NEW zcl_example( subrc = sy-subrc ).

or even skipping parameter if it has default value, I have to do

DATA(subrc) = sy-subrc.
DATA(x) = NEW zcl_example( subrc = subrc ).

I actually wanted to use it in exception, something like.

    IF sy-subrc <> 0.
      RAISE EXCEPTION TYPE zcx EXPORTING subrc = sy-subrc.
    ENDIF.

entry.title: Re: BTP Trial Account: Cloud Connector disconnected
entry.content:
> "Unable to recognize the artifact type"

I don't think, this error has anything to do with the Cloud Connector. Can it be, that your Trial Account has expired? (I think that trial accounts expire after a few weeks of inactivity.)

 

> I hadn't previously configured a Cloud Connector for this account  and I don't know if it's required,
> but I was previously able to create Process Automations in the account. If there was a Cloud Connector
> before I am assuming it was a 'default' Cloud Connector administered by whoever takes care of Trial
> Accounts in general.

There is not such thing as a "default" Cloud Connector, and as a Cloud Connector needs to be installed in the on-premises network, it cannot be installed centrally. It can only be installed & connected by yourself, so if you hadn't done this earlier, then there never was a Cloud Connector connected to your account.

And it is not required in general, only if your Cloud application needs to make HTTP or RFC calls to an on-premises backend system that is hidden behind a firewall. If you don't need that, then you don't need a Cloud Connector.

 

> I have tried to contact Support but to do so it requires selecting a customer, and I do not have one - I am an SAP Employee

Then you can just open a ServiceNow ticket of type "DEVINC". No customer needed for that.

entry.title: Re: Belgium- Annual Sales List for Company Codes with Loc...
entry.content:
This issue was raised to SAP & received below response.

Dear,

In reply to your request, I can give you the following information:

  • Many classic ABAP-reports for tax reporting were enabled with alternative currency because of the EURO-conversion.  This feature is still there and can be used for any currency. 
  • The SAP Document and Reporting Compliance reports "BE_SL_ANNUAL" and also "BE_VAT_DCL" don't support alternative currency, they only support company code currency being EUR or when plants abroad is active, where the reporting currency is in EUR.  When plants abroad is not active, we cannot support company code currency being USD.

entry.title: Re: Regarding the error message in In-House Repair (3XK)
entry.content:
Hi Nonni,

this errror is on item level. There are to responsible employees assigned.
This is default configuration, if a different employee adding the item, than the one how is maintained on header level. In this case you can simply remove the "wrong" employee on item level.

Best Regards,
Udo

entry.title: Re: Enterprise Architecture as a Leadership Factor
entry.content: This looks like an excellent session @Michael_Blaschke  and @Helmut congratulations🚀

entry.title: Re: Excel add-in sac planning
entry.content: My topic is to give the added value of the Excel add-in on SAP SAC planning.

entry.title: Re: Out-of-the-Box Document Grounding in SAP AI Core: RAG with SAP Help Portal
entry.content:
hi @Cocquerel , Glad to hear the issue is resolved. With the Orchestration API, document URLs like `help.sap.com` are not included in the response context; you would need to use the Vector Retrieval Search API to retrieve them.
On pricing — as far as I know (I'll double-check to confirm) — for `help.sap.com` as the repository type, you only need to factor in Retrieval in Grounding, whereas for vector repositories, both Storage and Retrieval in Grounding apply.

entry.title: Re: Mass Fixed Asset Retirement OData Version issue
entry.content:
Hi,

 

the only API that is supported for this scenario is using V4 model, no alternative can be provided.

Example of importing an IDOC monitor.

entry.title: Re: Demand Driven MRP (DDMRP)：Create consumption data que...
entry.content:
Hi @lannew 

Did you maintain the following transactional data:

  • Goods Issue data for ADU calculation and/or

  • Planned Independent Requirement for ADU calculation

Maybe you also check customizing one more time for: 

  • Buffer Profile

  • ADU Exclude Movement types

I assume the transactional data is the issue, but let me know if it works. 

Best regards, Markus

entry.title: Re: PEPPOL Integration with SAP Business Network
entry.content:
Good information Kruthika.

I have few questions; it would be great if you can provide your input for the same.

1. Is it mandatory for supplier to be registered on SAP Business Network?

2. Is supplier access point being different than SAP DRC or it is same?

3. Is there any test PEPPOL system is there before purchasing the licenses?

Regards

Shiv

entry.title: Re: Merging Users in IAS
entry.content:
In general the recommendation is to avoid multiple systems of origin for one and the same user to prevent conflicts and overwriting of user data😕

You might have a look at https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-identity-services/cloud-identity-services/provisioning-scenario-with-identity-directory?version=Cloud#merging-data-from-multiple-sources for recommendations in case it cannot be avoided.

entry.title: Best Practices for SAP Integration in Custom App Development?
entry.content: I am currently working on a custom app development project and need to integrate it with SAP's various solutions (like SAP S/4HANA or SAP Cloud Platform).

entry.title: Why my deploy "Deploy using cf deploy" is failed?
entry.content:
Link: https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/cp-cap-java-deploy-cf.html

Step 7:

I do it. But I got the error:

Error while binding service instance "bookstore-db" to application "bookstore-db-deployer": Could not bind service "bookstore-db" to application "bookstore-db-deployer": 422 Unprocessable Entity: CF-UnprocessableEntity(10008): Service instance not found
Error while binding service instance "bookstore-db" to application "bookstore-srv": Could not bind service "bookstore-db" to application "bookstore-srv": 422 Unprocessable Entity: CF-UnprocessableEntity(10008): Service instance not found

And I check the instance in the SAP BTP Cockpit Overview.

The "bookstore-db" instance is Creation failed.

I follow the all step in the lesson. Did I forget which step?

 

Thanks.

Best Regards,

Bin Huang

entry.title: Re: Enterprise Architecture as a Leadership Factor

entry.title: Crystal Report 2020 Turkish Character Set Problem with ODBC (RDO) Connection
entry.content: I am using SAP Cyrstal Report 2020 64 bit with ASP.NET. My database is MySQL. I am using ODBC (RDO) connection for report. I don't have any Turkish characters problen in development workstation. But When I deploy this report to the server, Some Turkish characters seems "?" symbol. I am using "<globalization uiCulture="tr" culture="tr-TR"/>" parameter in web.config. How can I resolve this problem?

SAP B1 UK localisation uses VatGroup rather than TaxGroup as the tax identifier at the line level.

Give it a try and let us know.

BR,
Felipe

entry.title: Re: Customer Return Orders
entry.content:
Hi 

Could you please check item category RBLN.

it can be used for single material without pricing information. 

in such context, perhaps you can choose No refund if Logistical follow up is 0001 receive into plant. 

otherwise, use No refund after material inspection in determine refund. 

 

Best Regards,

bin

entry.title: Single payment medium format for all countries and All banks
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Can you please confirm, is it possible to configure single payment medium format that can be assigned for any country and any bank account (one payment medium format should be allowed for all the bank accounts irrespective of country).

please let me know is it feasible. If yes, kindly let me know how to setup.

Regards,

Kavitha D

entry.title: Change Technical Object - update characteristic programmatically
entry.content:
We have a requirement that when a user updates a particular Equipment characteristic in the Change Technical Object app, a different characteristic will auto-populate. This is because they are dates and one will always be the same number of years after the other according to business rules.

I have tried using extension point EAM_TECHNOBJECT_FIELD_CONTROL in Custom Logic, but characteristics are not available there.

Our UI developers are telling me it's not possible for them to do anything either because Change Technical Object is a FPM WebDynpro application.

Is there any way I can meet this requirement?

entry.title: How to check the reason when some items are not released from ACDOCA to ACDOCU(FIN-CS-COR-DT-RUJ)
entry.content:
1) Check the support package level in table CVERS for component: S4CORE & UIAPFI70 , with the support package level, search SAP notes for components FIN-CS-COR-DT-RUJ, make sure all notes are implemented in your system.  This is quite important if you want to avoid duplicate efforts.

2) Once the notes are completly implemented, you may go to the app "Schedule jobs for consolidation tasks", and create a new job with template "Release Universal Journals". Then in step 3, select "Complete Period" under replication type. And run the data release again.   In most of the cases, the issue can be resolved with a complete run. If the issue persist, plesae go to next step.

3) Check in table FINCS_BUNIT , FINCS_BUNIT_ATD, and FINCS_BUNIT_ATVD for related cons.unit
3.1) in FINCS_BUNIT, you can get the assigned company for the cons.unit. And then use it to check in table T001 with RCOMP = company, with this you will know the company code(BUKRS)
3.2) in table FINCS_BUNIT_ATD, you can get the from and to fiscal year periods for the cons.unit.
3.3) In table FINCS_BUNIT_ATVD, find "CU Attributes CUAVS" and "Univ. Journ. Integr. TRANS".  With "CU Attributes CUAVS", you can go to t-cd: CXB1, and check related consolidation version. Make sure the "CU Attributes" in the consolidation version correctly customized.   And for "Univ. Journ. Integr.", value "H" means "Transfer from Universal Journal", while value "U" means no integration(no records can be released from universal journal)

4) Check in CXB3, for the field "From Year for Preparation Ledger". This helps you to know if GRPL is used or not for the period you run RUJ.
4.1) If GRPL is used, then check the FAQ note 3412034 - Troubleshooting Tips for Realignment Function (RF) or Release of Universal Journals (RUJ) in S/4HANA Group Reporting with Integration with Preparation Ledger (GRPL) active.   This FAQ can help you to analyze the reason why data missing.  
4.2) If GRPL is not used, then check the note 3393548 - SAP S/4HANA Group Reporting: How to use Delta Mode in Release Universal Journals Task in a non-Group Reporting Preparation Ledger (GRPL) Integration Scenario

5) if above steps cannot help you, then you will need to do data analysis with CDS view.
Basically, the data flow for release universal journal looks like:
ACDOCA -> a lot of CDS views -> ACDOCU (meanwhile, it will refer to "Data release Aggregation" setting in t-cd: FINCS_ADDLFLD_SEL_U.
For a lot of CDS views, which looks like below, when you check it in t-cd: SE16N, you will be asked to input Time Stamp, please input 0 - 999999999999999.
P_REALTIMERPTDFINDATANRL
P_REALTIMERPTDFINDATANRL_06
P_REALTIMERPTDFINDATANRL_05
P_REALTIMERPTDFINDATANRL_04
P_REALTIMERPTDFINDATANRL_03
P_REALTIMERPTDFINDATANRL_02
P_REALTIMERPTDFINDATANRL_01
I_JournalEntryItem
ACDOCA

Those are basic CDS view/table used for the RUJ data flow, there are a lot of other CDS views also be joined within those CDS view, eg. I_CompanyCode / I_CnsldtnUnit_3 /I_CnsldtnUnitByTime /I_CnsldtnUnitByTimeVersion /I_CnsldtnVersion / I_FiscalCalendarDate /I_FSItemMappingAssgmtWithVers /I_CnsldtnFinStmntItem /I_BreakdownCategoryField /I_CnsldtnSubItemCategoryEnhcd /I_CnsldtnSubassgmtDfltValue 
All of those Joining CDS view are also quite important, for example when GRPL is not used, you might have fiscal year variant in FI not same with fiscal year variant in Group reporting version, which need you to do analysis carefully.
==============

entry.title: How to implement ODATA on Bapi?
entry.content: I'm new with ODATA. I have created a BAPI, CDS Views and want to use them together. Can I consume or implement ODATA on Bapi or is it the other way around? Is it possible to implement it using RAP?

entry.title: Purchase Order Accruals Review - All accruals are reviewed
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

I am working with scope item 2VB – Purchase Order Accruals in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud and encountered an issue.

In the "Review Purchase Order Accruals" app, all accruals are immediately showing under "Review Finished".
There are no accruals listed as "Unreviewed", even though we expected them to require manual review first.
(Please see the attached screenshot for reference.)

We have already configured the workflow for Purchase Order Accruals Review as per the test script, but this issue still occurs.

Has anyone experienced this before?
Could it be related to the workflow conditions, default behavior, or maybe missing configuration?

Any advice would be highly appreciated.

entry.title: How to select multiple authors in a SAP CAP Fiori Elements app?
entry.content:
Hi

I’m building a SAP CAP application for managing books and authors.
I followed some examples and tried to recreate them step-by-step.
Currently, my app looks like what you can see in the attached screenshots.

When I open the Fiori preview for "Books", I can see all books.
If I click on a book, the detail page opens, and I can edit it, so far, everything works as expected.

Now my question:
How can I select multiple authors in the detail page instead of just one?
I can't find a way to make this possible.

Do I need to change the relationship between the entities for this to work?

I would like to stick to the standard as much as possible and implement everything using annotations rather than modifying the .js files.

Below you can find my schema.cds and service.cds.
service.cds:

 

using { sap.capire.bookshop as my } from '../db/schema';

service BookshopService @(path: '/browse') {
  @readonly entity Books as projection on my.Books {
    *,
    author.name as authorName
  };
}

service AdminService @(path: '/admin') {
  entity Books as projection on my.Books;
  entity Authors as projection on my.Authors;
}

annotate AdminService.Books with @(
  UI: {
    HeaderInfo: {
      TypeName: 'Buch',
      TypeNamePlural: 'Bücher',
      Title: { Value: title },
      Description: { Value: author.name }
    },
    SelectionFields: [ title, author_ID, price ],
    LineItem: [
      { Value: title, Label: 'Titel' },
      { Value: author.name, Label: 'Autor' },
      { Value: stock, Label: 'Lagerbestand' },
      { Value: price, Label: 'Preis' },
      { Value: currency.symbol, Label: 'Währung' }
    ],
    Facets: [
      {
        $Type: 'UI.CollectionFacet',
        Label: 'Details',
        Facets: [
          {
            $Type: 'UI.ReferenceFacet',
            Label: 'Allgemeine Informationen',
            Target: '@UI.FieldGroup#General'
          }
        ]
      }
    ],
    FieldGroup#General: {
      Data: [
        { Value: title, Label: 'Titel' },
        { Value: author_ID, Label: 'Autor' },
        { Value: stock, Label: 'Lagerbestand' },
        { Value: price, Label: 'Preis' },
        { Value: currency_code, Label: 'Währung' },
        { Value: description, Label: 'Beschreibung' }
      ]
    }
  }
);

annotate AdminService.Authors with @(
  UI: {
    HeaderInfo: {
      TypeName: 'Autor',
      TypeNamePlural: 'Autoren',
      Title: { Value: name }
    },
    SelectionFields: [ name ],
    LineItem: [
      { Value: name, Label: 'Name' },
      { Value: dateOfBirth, Label: 'Geburtsdatum' }
    ],
    Facets: [
      {
        $Type: 'UI.CollectionFacet',
        Label: 'Details',
        Facets: [
          {
            $Type: 'UI.ReferenceFacet',
            Label: 'Allgemeine Informationen',
            Target: '@UI.FieldGroup#General'
          },
          {
            $Type: 'UI.ReferenceFacet',
            Label: 'Bücher',
            Target: 'books/@UI.LineItem'
          }
        ]
      }
    ],
    FieldGroup#General: {
      Data: [
        { Value: name, Label: 'Name' },
        { Value: dateOfBirth, Label: 'Geburtsdatum' }
      ]
    }
  }
);

annotate AdminService.Books with @odata.draft.enabled;
annotate AdminService.Authors with @odata.draft.enabled;

annotate AdminService.Books {
  author @(
    Common: {
      Text: {
        $value: author.name,
        ![@UI.TextArrangement]: #TextOnly
      },
      ValueList: {
        entity: 'Authors',
        type: #fixed
      }
    }
  );
}

 

schema.cds:

 

namespace sap.capire.bookshop;

using { Currency, managed } from '@sap/cds/common';

entity Books : managed {
  key ID       : UUID @(Core.Computed : true);
  title        : String(100) @title: 'Titel';
  author       : Association to Authors @title: 'Autor';
  stock        : Integer @title: 'Lagerbestand';
  price        : Decimal(9,2) @title: 'Preis';
  currency     : Currency @title: 'Währung';
  description  : String(1000) @title: 'Beschreibung';
}

entity Authors : managed {
  key ID       : UUID @(Core.Computed : true);
  name         : String(100) @title: 'Name';
  dateOfBirth  : Date @title: 'Geburtsdatum';
  books        : Association to many Books on books.author = $self;
}

 

 

Testdata csv:

 

ID,name,dateOfBirth
3b22d8e3-01df-44d3-8ee7-6126a05ad547,Max Mustermann,1970-01-01
8c3a4cce-7c20-4d40-839d-80ec4e5f1df2,Erika Musterfrau,1985-03-15
9e3844b1-bff7-4a56-9f46-1acbaee2f1a7,Johann Wolfgang von Goethe,1749-08-28
ID,title,author_ID,stock,price,currency_code,description
7f03a0b3-ce3d-4a5e-8da0-67a7f1fef2e6,Der Buchshop,3b22d8e3-01df-44d3-8ee7-6126a05ad547,100,19.99,EUR,Ein spannendes Buch über einen Buchshop
60ad0b9c-b3d8-45b9-a318-0c50a7b35fed,Der Programmierer,8c3a4cce-7c20-4d40-839d-80ec4e5f1df2,50,29.99,EUR,Ein Buch über die Herausforderungen des Programmierens
84eef739-3c7e-4af9-b32c-cbdc47ab6bc2,Faust,9e3844b1-bff7-4a56-9f46-1acbaee2f1a7,75,15.99,EUR,Ein Klassiker der deutschen Literatur

entry.title: Enhanced access controls and develop a private job requisition template
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Do we have an option to Implement enhanced access controls and develop a private job requisition template with customized reporting filters to maintain confidentiality.

Introduce a centralized, automated job requisition system that integrates with communication tools, streamlining data entry and notifications, and develop automated workflows to handle rejections and restart processes efficiently.

Regards,

Prem

 

SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting

entry.title: BTP Build Process Automation Job Status Remains As Ready
entry.content:
Hello,

We are experiencing a problem in our BTP Build Process Automation system. The Job we created remains in the "Ready" state and gives an error because it is not progressing. The job cannot be run. However, when the same automation is tested manually, it works without any problems. The automation is deployed in "Public" and scheduled as "Scheduled" type. Destination connection and Environments connections have been established successfully. There is no input in the automation, data is received with the "Call Web Service with Destination" tool and Automation is selected as the Scheduler operator.

Detailed information is provided as follows. I kindly request your support for the solution of the problem.

We want to set up a job for the automation we created on SAP BTP Build Process Automation. The job we created remains in "Ready" status, and because the status does not progress, the job gives an error after 1 day and does not work. However, when the automation is run manually for testing, it works without any issues.

1- Error displayed on screen
When we checked for the "Maximum number of concurrent unattended execution reached" error shown in the job, we found that there is only one Agent.

2- Job Setup Process
The created automation has been deployed in "Public".

A scheduler has been set up with the Scheduled type for the deployed project.

The Destination connection has been successfully established. The connection for Environments has been set up.

3- Scheduler Details
We do not have any inputs for the Automation. Data is obtained using the "Call Web Service with Destination" tool.

For the scheduler runner, Automation has been selected.

4- Automation Details
In the first 13 steps of our application, there are processes for retrieving and filtering appropriate data. In the subsequent processes, appropriate operations are performed on the screens we recorded. When the Automation is run manually, it works without any issues.

Step 1

Step 2


Step 3

entry.title: TM New Attribute to addition selection profile and use it in Planning Cockpit
entry.content:
This blog post explains how to add a custom attribute to the Additional Selection Profile for Freight Units (FU) and Freight Orders (FO), and how to use this custom field in the planning cockpit.


The requirement was to filter the Transportation Cockpit based on a custom field. Since it was not possible to add the custom field directly, an enhancement was implemented to make the custom field available in the Additional Selection Profile. Once added, this custom field can be used to filter results within the Transportation Cockpit.

Step 1: 

Add the custom field ZZVEHICLE_TYPE to the structure /SCMTMS/D_TORROT, and ensure that the save strategy is implemented to populate ZZVEHICLE_TYPE with the required value.

Step 2:

Enhance the structure /SCMTMS/S_TOR_QUERY, which is used in /SCMTMS/S_TOR_Q_FU_STG_PLN, and add the custom field ZZVEHICLE_TYPE

Adding the field ZVEHICLE_TYPE to the above structure will make it available as an attribute in the Additional Selection Profile.

Step 3:

Additionally, implement the method GET_SHLP_FIELD_WHITELIST of class /SCMTMS/CL_PROF_HELPER to allow the custom field to be visible in the Additional Selection Attributes.

Step 4:

Now, the field ZZVEHICLE_TYPE is visible and has been added to the Additional Selection Attributes.

Step 5:

Enhance the method GET_QUERY_ENHANCE_TABLE of class /SCMTMS/CL_TOR_Q_SUPERCLASS to specify the TM database table that should be referenced for the custom Z field added in the selection profile and used for filtering.

After completing the above developments and implementations, the Transportation Cockpit will be able to filter based on the new additional fields in the selection profile.

 

 

I hope this blog post will be helpful to SAP developers.


Regards,
Prince Agarwal

entry.title: Re: Actual Cost transfer from PS to PPM Item
entry.content: Hi I'm also currently facing same error did you get the solution?

entry.title: Re: Scrolling Bar for Available Fields missing on SAP Fio...
entry.content:
Thanks for your answer ArunJacob.

Yes this is a custom application, it is a bex query app behind this custom app. So I'm not able to implement the code you give in my cds.

Do you know if an another solution exist for this kind of custom app ?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: How to dynamically get a list of the entities of a RAP Business Object (or how to traverse a tre
entry.content: Sorry, could you share a link with the objects?

entry.title: Re: Fiori Elements RAP Attachment (LOB) Upload Not Refres...
entry.content:
Eventually I solved this using a side effect in the XML-annotations with the attachment as both the source and target field:

<Annotation Term="Common.SideEffects" Qualifier="fileUploaded">
	<Record Type="Common.SideEffectsType">
		<PropertyValue Property="SourceProperties">
			<Collection>
				<PropertyPath>Attachment</PropertyPath>
			</Collection>
		</PropertyValue>
		<PropertyValue Property="TargetProperties">
			<Collection>
				<String>Attachment</String>
			</Collection>
		</PropertyValue>
	</Record>
</Annotation>

entry.title: Re: Value of custom fields not shown in list FAGLB03
entry.content:
Hello @edst_68 ,

I'm facing the same issue with other fields (e.g: WBS).  Did you find a solution in the meantime?

Kind regards,

Gilbert

entry.title: Not able to select the Path or choose file Using Abap Code
entry.content:
HI.
Need some help and suggestions.
There is one Custom Tcode for Z program. One of the functionalities is like Need to select the path from the Desktop, so that program will build one logic and output will be save into the selected location.

In Z-Tcode Once click on the F4, it is working as expected like asking user to choose the directory from the Desktop. But this Z-program is coming Fiori once select the F4. Not able to choose anything.

Please have a look on two views i had attached. I debug the code. from both GUI and Fiori. have not seen any return message from the below Piece of code. May I know why the issue is coming. Any settings need to be change. Please Correct me. and checked with Security team too any authorization missing issue. But they replied like everything is good from their side. Thank U.

AT SELECTION-SCREEN ON VALUE-REQUEST FOR p_fpath.

  CALL METHOD cl_gui_frontend_services=>directory_browse
    CHANGING
      selected_folder      = p_fpath
    EXCEPTIONS
      cntl_error           = 1
      error_no_gui         = 2
      not_supported_by_gui = 3
      OTHERS               = 4.
  IF sy-subrc EQ 0.
    gv_pathname = p_fpath.
    WRITE: gv_pathname.
  ENDIF.

entry.title: Re: Deep dive into the Fit-to-Standard Workshops to streamline SAP S/4Hana Public Cloud Implementati
entry.content: @ShridharKulk Please send an email to moderators@sap.com if you would like to delete content.

entry.title: Intrastat Reporting in S4 HANA for Plants Abroad
entry.content:
Dear Team,

Hope you all are doing great.

We are in S4 HANA 2023 On Premise edition. We are implementing Intrastat Reporting under Governance, Risk and Compliance Module.

We have a business scenario wherein the Company Code is in Great Britain and the delivering plant is also located in Great Britain. The Customer is based out of France and the Port of Entry of the Goods is Netherlands. We have Plants Abroad activated for Netherlands and have the VAT Registration for Netherlands.

In such a scenario how will the Intrastat Report work i.e. we need to report the Arrival of the product in Netherlands.

Any guidance in this regard will be highly appreciated. Thank you for your time and support.

With kindest regards,

Akhil Poddar

entry.title: Re: Preferred unit of measure
entry.content:
Hello,

I just did a quick test with a product having CAR and PAL as alternative UoMs. So, CAR would be your BAG. Only CAR is set up as stock-specific in the warehouse (SSC-UI Define Unit of Measure Attributes). Additionally, the product has CAR as preferred UoM.

When creating an inbound delivery based on a purchase order with 48 PC the inbound delivery in WM will get UoM CAR (as 48 can be divided by 6 without remainder) => 8 CAR.
Also, in my case the resulting warehouse task gets 8 CAR as alternative UoM.

The AUoM CAR is displayed in RF environment, too.

When confirming the warehouse task the resulting stock item gets CAR as alternative UoM.

So, it seems like you have some other settings in your warehouse. Can you please check?

Best regards, Tobias

entry.title: SAP DataSphere abd DP agent connenction - Security / Network question
entry.content:
Dear Gurus.

We are going to connect the S/4 HANA On Premise system to SAP Datasphere using both Cloud Connector and DP agent.

It is unclear how DP agent is connected to SAP Cloud network. Does DP agent need the Cloud Connector to communicate with SAP cloud or DP Agent can open the channel by itself like CC? Hope no incoming connector should be opened.

Where DP agent should be installed? In DMZ together with CC or inside the customer network?

Thank you.

Regards

Vladimir Kogan
